purpose: Define the future backend contract for replacing localStorage CX.data with a clean Firestore backend without changing module calls.
goldenRule: Keep the same CX.data interface. Do not patch UI modules from backend. Do not connect old databases.

tenants.notes: Tenant configuration root. No raw secrets.

projects.notes: Project configuration for country, currency, HR source ref, questionnaire routing, docs, rules, certification, scheduling, payments and integrations.

visits.notes: Visit state and HR derived status. No visual dedupe.

assignments.notes: Source-aware assignment control for platform to HR and HR to platform sync.

shoppers.sensitivePolicy: No raw DPI, bank data, NDA files or private documents in public docs/repo. Store only sanitized operational profile here. Sensitive data needs protected policy or separate encrypted mechanism.

certifications.notes: Preserve already presented certifications. Question banks can be generated with Gemini only under human review gate.

liquidations.notes: Payment state for June and later. No real payment execution from preview.

hrImports.notes: Historical import control, sanitized and source-safe.

conflictReviews.notes: Conflicts are routed to human review; never silently overwritten.

outbox.notes: Prepared messages only until Make/Outlook/WhatsApp provider gates are enabled.

cxDataInterface.migrationStrategy: Introduce backend adapter behind the existing CX.data facade only after gates pass. Modules keep calling CX.data as today.

gates.devReadOnly: Allowed after config and rules review. Reads only.
gates.devWrites: Blocked until explicit approval and rollback plan.
gates.stagingImport: Blocked until sanitized candidate and conflict review pass.
gates.productionCutover: Blocked until Paula explicit GO, smoke, rollback and no NO_GO critical.
